remaining_tasks.name: Plan Phase 7: Quick Wins (wrap + session commands)
Plan + Execute Phase 9: WFP Port-Level + Proxy Filtering
Plan + Execute Phase 10: ETW-Based Learn Command
Plan + Execute Phase 11: Runtime Capability Expansion (stretch)

human_actions_pending.action: Review WINDOWS-V2-ROADMAP.md and confirm phase order before planning Phase 7
human_actions_pending.context: Roadmap was just generated from gap research; user approval before execution is advisable

decisions.rationale: Phase 7 validates entry-point guard removal pattern before Phase 8 layers ConPTY complexity on top

decisions.decision: Phases 9, 10, 11 are independent of each other
decisions.rationale: WFP IPC, ETW, and supervisor socket are separate subsystems

decisions.decision: Single IPC version bump for Phase 9
decisions.rationale: Gaps 4 (proxy) and 5 (port filtering) share WFP IPC extension; combining avoids two service deployments

decisions.decision: ETW library decision (ferrisetw vs windows-sys direct) deferred to plan 10-01
decisions.rationale: Must evaluate crates.io freshness and feature completeness before committing

decisions.decision: Gap 6b (runtime trust interception) deferred to v3.0
decisions.rationale: Requires kernel minifilter driver; no user-mode workaround acceptable

decisions.decision: Minimum build for ConPTY and ETW: Windows 10 build 17763 (1809)
decisions.rationale: ConPTY API requires 1809; enforced via RtlGetVersion at runtime; no silent fallback

next_action: Run `/gsd:plan-phase 7` to begin Phase 7 (Quick Wins: nono wrap + session log commands). Phases 9, 10, 11 can be planned in parallel if multiple sessions run concurrently.
context_notes: v1.0 is complete (6 phases, all verified). v2.0 roadmap (Phases 7-11) was created in this session from gap analysis. No v2.0 code has been written yet. Three .planning files are uncommitted (see uncommitted_files). Branch is pr/windows-epic12-clean-v2.
